title: Why Is There So Much Legalese in Magic!?
overview: Surrounded by her favorite things, Anzu gets ready to immerse herself in a new video game. But she quickly notices that the game is not what it seems.

title: It's Time for Children to Go to Sleep
overview: Horrified to find a cockroach in her house, Anzu escapes to a nearby park only to be met by a sudden torrential rain. To her dismay, Tsukasa passes by.

title: My Life Has Become a Dating Sim
overview: Anzu dreams about her dear Momohiki, then wakes up to a mortifying reality. Tsukasa checks up on his apartment and is shocked by what he finds.

title: The Childhood Friend Is Easy Mode
overview: Flustered by the sudden appearance of Junta, Anzu angrily confronts Riri. But the mischievous tiny wizard has a few more tricks in store for them.

title: You're More Troublesome in Flesh and Blood
overview: After bumping into Junta and Tsukasa, Riri organizes a spontaneous dinner at Anzu's house and tries to stir up some unwelcome romantic tension.

title: A "Reincarnated-in-Another-World" Date
overview: As the unlikely trio start their life together, Anzu finds herself a job to distract herself from Riri's schemes but ends up on an impromptu date.

title: You Sure Have Your Quirks...
overview: After the accident, Anzu shows up to school with the rich and handsome Hijiri Koganei, attracting unwanted attention from her nosy classmates.

title: Goose Bumps! I Am a Goose Now
overview: When a rowdy man accuses Anzu of spilling his coffee, a beautiful savior comes to the rescue. Meanwhile, Riri comes up with a plan to speed up progress.

title: Ginger Ale Is a Force Majeure
overview: On her way home from school, Anzu bumps into two childhood friends. As they catch up on old times at a nearby cafe, she has a revelation about Junta.

title: Other Way Around, Dummy
overview: Chased out of her home by her unruly big brother, Saki turns up at Anzu's house. Riri nudges everyone to go on a summer outing together.

title: Just Tell Me if You Don't Like It
overview: Anzu, Hijiri and his chauffer have a fun day at a game center. Later, a mysterious woman approaches Anzu and introduces herself.

title: Last Story!?
overview: Cornered by Yukana Kishi, Anzu finds herself in a dangerous situation. Worried about her whereabouts, her friends scramble to find her.
